description_long: This is an older model red sedan with a boxy, utilitarian design and visible signs of wear, including patches of faded paint and rust, especially on the roof. The car features four doors, chrome door handles, and black trim around the windows. The front grille is rectangular with horizontal slats, and the headlights are square, giving the vehicle a classic, retro appearance. Both front and rear license plates are present, with the text 'VU-239-1J' visible. The wheels are steel with simple, utilitarian hubcaps, and the tires show some wear. The windows are slightly tinted, and the overall build suggests a sturdy, metal construction typical of sedans from the late 20th century.
description: A weathered, red, boxy four-door sedan with faded paint, square headlights, and simple steel wheels. The car has visible license plates and a utilitarian, retro design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular grille, square headlights, windshield, and front license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the four doors, chrome handles, side mirrors, and the worn roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the trunk, rear windshield, taillights, and rear license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the four doors, chrome handles, and roof wear.
attribute_license_plate: Both front and rear license plates present, white background with black text 'VU-239-1J'.
attribute_wheel_design: Steel wheels with simple, circular hubcaps and five visible lug nuts, finished in gray.
